records.question: Were was the Mexican state after which there is Villa Unión, Sinaloa located?
records.answer: It was in the **Estado de Occidente** (the former State of the West), which later split into **Sinaloa and Sonora**.
records.judge_reasoning: The candidate identifies the relevant former Mexican state (Estado de Occidente/State of the West), which is the intended location reference behind Villa Unión, Sinaloa.

trajectory.content: Were was the Mexican state after which there is Villa Unión, Sinaloa located?
It was in the **Estado de Occidente** (the former State of the West), which later split into **Sinaloa and Sonora**.
